# Canonical Benefits Access Roadmap (5 Stages)

This is the production source of truth for the Benefits Access workflow template.
Focused on SNAP (Oregon) but structured to generalize to other benefits programs.

## 1 — Eligibility & Screening (Day 0–3)

**Stage Title:** Eligibility & Screening  
**Timeline Goal:** Day 0–3

**Subtasks:**

- Confirm Oregon residency (Day 0–1)
- Confirm identity documentation status (Day 0–1)
- Identify household composition (Day 0–2)
- Review basic income sources (Day 0–2)
- Assess housing status (Day 0–2)
- Identify potential expedited SNAP eligibility (Day 0–3)
- Determine if other benefits screening is needed (Day 0–3)

## 2 — Documentation Preparation (Day 2–10)

**Stage Title:** Documentation Preparation  
**Timeline Goal:** Day 2–10

**Subtasks:**

- Identify required documentation list (Day 2–3)
- Confirm ID availability or initiate replacement (Day 2–5)
- Confirm proof of residence strategy (Day 2–5)
- Confirm income verification plan (Day 2–7)
- Confirm citizenship/eligible noncitizen documentation (Day 2–7)
- Identify verification barriers (Day 2–10)
- Create document follow‑up plan (Day 2–10)

## 3 — Application Submission (Day 5–14)

**Stage Title:** Application Submission  
**Timeline Goal:** Day 5–14

**Subtasks:**

- Choose application method (online / phone / paper) (Day 5–7)
- Complete SNAP application (Day 5–10)
- Confirm application submitted (Day 5–10)
- Record application date (Day 5–10)
- Confirm expedited request if applicable (Day 5–10)
- Provide confirmation/reference number (Day 5–14)

## 4 — Interview & Verification (Day 7–21)

**Stage Title:** Interview & Verification  
**Timeline Goal:** Day 7–21

**Subtasks:**

- Confirm interview scheduled (Day 7–14)
- Prepare participant for interview (Day 7–14)
- Ensure interview completed (Day 7–21)
- Track requested additional verifications (Day 7–21)
- Submit follow‑up documents (Day 7–21)
- Monitor verification deadlines (Day 7–21)

## 5 — Decision & Next Steps (Day 14–30)

**Stage Title:** Decision & Next Steps  
**Timeline Goal:** Day 14–30

**Subtasks:**

- Confirm approval or denial status (Day 14–30)
- If approved, confirm benefit start date (Day 14–30)
- Confirm EBT card received or replacement requested (Day 14–30)
- Educate on benefit use and reporting requirements (Day 14–30)
- If denied, review denial reason (Day 14–30)
- Determine if appeal is appropriate (Day 14–30)
- Assist with appeal submission if applicable (Day 14–30)

## Data Protection Notes

This roadmap must NOT store SSNs, exact income amounts, full DHS case numbers, or document scans. It tracks workflow progress only.
